ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer (e.g., Single, Married) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer (e.g., High School, College) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer (e.g., Construction & Extraction, Office & Administrative Support) */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income range of the customer (e.g., Less than $12500, $100000 or More) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer (e.g., Young, Middle-aged, Senior) */,
  "occupation_label" INTEGER /* Label-encoded value of the customer's occupation */,
  "income_label" INTEGER /* Label-encoded value of the customer's income range */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "preferred_dining_time" TEXT /* Preferred dining time of the customer (e.g., Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner) */,
  "preferred_dining_day" TEXT /* Preferred dining day of the customer (e.g., Monday, Tuesday, Weekend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the visit */,
  "bar" TEXT /* Frequency of visits to bars (e.g., never, less1, 1~3, 4~8, gt8) */,
  "coffee_house" TEXT /* Frequency of visits to coffee houses (e.g., never, less1, 1~3, 4~8, gt8) */,
  "carry_away" TEXT /* Frequency of carry-away meals (e.g., less1, 1~3, 4~8, gt8) */,
  "restaurant_less_than_20" TEXT /* Frequency of visits to restaurants less than $20 (e.g., 1~3, 4~8, gt8) */,
  "restaurant_20_to_50" TEXT /* Frequency of visits to restaurants $20 to $50 (e.g., less1, 1~3, 4~8, gt8) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the visit (e.g., Sunny, Snowy) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of day of the visit (e.g., 7AM, 10AM, 2PM) */,
  "coupon" TEXT /* Type of coupon used (e.g., Bar, Coffee House, Carry out & Take away) */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time of the coupon (e.g., 1d, 2h) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the visit (e.g., No Urgent Place, Work) */,
  "passenger" TEXT /* Passenger of the customer (e.g., Alone, Friend(s), Kid(s), Partner) */,
  "to_coupon_geq_15min" INTEGER /* Whether the travel time to the coupon location is 15 minutes or more */,
  "to_coupon_geq_25min" INTEGER /* Whether the travel time to the coupon location is 25 minutes or more */,
  "direction_same" INTEGER /* Whether the direction to the coupon location is the same as the destination */,
  "direction_opp" INTEGER /* Whether the direction to the coupon location is opposite to the destination */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used for the visit (e.g., Walk, Drive, Public Transport) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the visit (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Mobile Payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_time FOREIGN KEY ("time") REFERENCES time_of_day ("time_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_passenger FOREIGN KEY ("passenger") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_coupon FOREIGN KEY ("coupon") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_type" TEXT /* Type of the coupon (e.g., Bar, Coffee House, Carry out & Take away) */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Expiration time of the coupon (e.g., 1d, 2h) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coupon */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Discount percentage offered by the coupon */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase required to use the coupon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., Sunny, Snowy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_of_day" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time of day */,
  "time_name" TEXT /* Name of the time of day (e.g., 7AM, 10AM, 2PM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time of day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination (e.g., No Urgent Place, Work) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger type (e.g., Alone, Friend(s), Kid(s), Partner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the passenger type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon redemption */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who redeemed the coupon */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon redeemed */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the coupon was redeemed */,
  "redemption_time" TEXT /* Time when the coupon was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dining_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dining preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the dining preference */,
  "dining_type" TEXT /* Type of dining preferred (e.g., Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner) */,
  "preferred_dining_time" TEXT /* Preferred dining time (e.g., Morning, Afternoon, Evening) */,
  "preferred_dining_day" TEXT /* Preferred dining day (e.g., Monday, Tuesday, Weekend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dining_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commute_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode of transportation */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode of transportation (e.g., Walk, Drive, Public Transport) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode of transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method of payment */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Mobile Payment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the visit */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_payments_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_commute" (
  "commute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commute */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit associated with the commute */,
  "commute_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used for the commute */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled for the commute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_commute_commute_mode FOREIGN KEY ("commute_mode") REFERENCES commute_modes ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_commute_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)
